title: Blue's Better Skeletons
description: Updates Skeletons to look more realistic with more lifelike animations
body:
READ BEFORE USING

This resource pack works for minecraft versions 1.20.5 and below down to version 1.19.2.

Blue's Better Skeletons updates skeletons to be more realistic. Skeletons have new, fully animated models and textures and new features that improve on the current minecraft skeleton.



This resource pack adds the following standout features:

Text version of the description

Dismemberment:
If you deal enough damage to a skeleton before it dies, there's a chance that its bones might fall off.
Reanimated:
Skeletons have been fully reanimated - Animations for idling, walking, attacks and death are more realistic than before.
Randomized deaths:
Skeleton death animations are randomized to make every kill unique.
Requirements:
This resource pack requires a CEM model parser to work.
There are two options for this:
Option 1:
the Entity Model Features mod + the Entity Texture Features mod.
Option 2:
Optifine.
